subcodes.title: Words to Rabbi Stephen Wise, spoken on 1912-05-13
subcodes.first_line: The term religious war is a misnomer, because there can be no war where there is religion. All we have is a hollow sham, a pretence. When once we have real religion, war will cease.
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
